category.scope_note: Air-source heat pump systems for residential and commercial space heating/cooling, comparing Chinese GB standards to Belgian/EU requirements.

target_market_label.zh: 比利时（NBN / 联邦经济部 / FANC）
target_market_label.zht: 比利時（NBN / 聯邦經濟部 / FANC）

title.en: China to Belgium Heat Pump Standards — Cross-Standard Comparison
title.zh: 中国空气源热泵进入比利时：跨标准对比
title.zht: 中國空氣源熱泵進入比利時：跨標準對比

description.en: Cross-standard comparison of air-source heat pump requirements for export from China to Belgium, covering CE marking, EMC, pressure equipment, F-gas refrigerants, Ecodesign, and safety standards.
description.zh: 中国空气源热泵出口比利时的跨标准对比，涵盖CE标志、电磁兼容、压力设备、氟化气体制冷剂、生态设计及安全标准。
description.zht: 中國空氣源熱泵出口比利時的跨標準對比，涵蓋CE標誌、電磁相容、壓力設備、氟化氣體製冷劑、生態設計及安全標準。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, refrigerant-handling guidance, pressure-system design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and installers should verify current Belgian and EU law, harmonised standards, F-gas licensing requirements, pressure equipment categories, and Belgian regional installation rules with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、制冷剂处理指导、压力系统设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行比利时及欧盟法律、协调标准、氟化气体许可要求、压力设备类别及比利时地区安装规则。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、製冷劑處理指導、壓力系統設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行比利時及歐盟法律、協調標準、氟化氣體許可要求、壓力設備類別及比利時地區安裝規則。

answer_first.en: CE marking under LVD, EMC, PED, and Ecodesign directives, Belgian-regional F-gas technician certification, RGIE/AREI electrical installation compliance, and Dutch/French product documentation are the major Belgium-specific compliance requirements for Chinese air-source heat pumps.
answer_first.zh: 依据低压指令、EMC指令、PED及生态设计指令取得CE标志，比利时地区氟化气体技术人员资质认证，RGIE/AREI电气安装合规，以及荷兰语/法语产品文件，是中国空气源热泵进入比利时的主要合规要求。
answer_first.zht: 依據低壓指令、EMC指令、PED及生態設計指令取得CE標誌，比利時地區氟化氣體技術人員資質認證，RGIE/AREI電氣安裝合規，以及荷蘭語/法語產品文件，是中國空氣源熱泵進入比利時的主要合規要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
